title: Duplication
description: A simple datapack that adds a useful way to duplicate blocks in Minecraft.
body:
# Usage
This datapack allows you to duplicate items.
To duplicate items, first build a structure with 1 ancient debris, 4 basalt, 1 crying obsidian and 4 lightning rods:

![On the first layer, ancient debris with basalt coming out from it. On the second layer, crying obsidian with lightning rods coming out from it.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f5b0a464089374b1840c91c672088cf36266664.png)

Next, light the top of the crying obsidian with a flint and steel enchanted with summoning. The flint and steel will break instantly.
This will create a duplicator. To use the duplicator, place the block you want to duplicate 2 blocks underneath it, then place basalt under the duplicator. It will duplicate the block.
# Installation
## Datapack
### On Create World
1. Click the *More* tab
2. Click *Data Packs*
3. Click *Open Pack Folder*
4. Paste in the downloaded datapack
5. Move the datapack to *Selected*
6. Click *Done*
### Add to existing world
1. Select the world
2. Click *Edit*
3. Click *Open World Folder*
4. Open the `datapacks` folder
5. Paste in the downloaded datapack
## Required Resource Pack
### Singleplayer
1. Open the resource pack list
2. Click *Open Pack Folder*
3. Paste in the downloaded resource pack
4. Move the resource pack to *Selected*
### Server
1. Add the downloaded resource pack as a server resource pack
2. Make server resource packs required
# Compatibility
This datapack is not currently intentionally compatible with other datapacks or mods.

However, it should be compatible with most mods or datapacks that don't change how flint and steel works.
